mapper.select: SELECT uuid, user_id as userId, card_id as cardId, create_time as createTime, study_duration as studyDuration, rarity, border_theme as borderTheme, card_theme as cardTheme, theme_category as themeCategory, markdown, image_url as imageUrl FROM card WHERE uuid = #{uuid}

SELECT uuid, user_id as userId, card_id as cardId, create_time as createTime, study_duration as studyDuration, rarity, border_theme as borderTheme, card_theme as cardTheme, theme_category as themeCategory, markdown, image_url as imageUrl FROM card WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE card SET user_id = #{userId}, card_id = #{cardId}, create_time = #{createTime}, study_duration = #{studyDuration}, rarity = #{rarity}, border_theme = #{borderTheme}, card_theme = #{cardTheme}, theme_category = #{themeCategory}, markdown = #{markdown}, image_url = #{imageUrl} WHERE uuid = #{uuid}
